name: Britain Covey
headline: Special-teams specialist with no path to fantasy snaps
body:
The on-field profile makes the case plainly: Covey logged just six games in 2025 at a 10.3% snap rate, running only 26 routes and drawing four targets for two catches and 20 yards. His 0.9% target share and 0.014 WOPR are roster-edge numbers, and they are not anomalies. Across 2023-2025 his target shares read 1.1%, 1.9%, and 0.9%, with route participation never clearing 6%. He has never scored a receiving touchdown in this sample and has cleared 42 yards in a season only once.

The usage ceiling is purely cosmetic for fantasy. He failed to lock down a 53-man spot elsewhere and carries a flat zero-reception projection for the year, leaving him essentially unrostered. Covey's value lives on returns and gadget snaps, not in the passing game, so there is no realistic redraft or dynasty angle here. Leave him on waivers in every standard format.
